name: A-Team: Trap Disposal Unit
name_jp: トラップ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>処</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>理</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>り</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>班</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> Ａチーム
desc: This effect can be used during either player's turn. When your opponent activates a Trap Card, Tribute this face-up card to negate the activation of the Trap Card and destroy it.
mnst_eff: This effect can be used during either player's turn. When your opponent activates a Trap Card, Tribute this face-up card to negate the activation of the Trap Card and destroy it.
eff: This effect can be used during either player's turn. When your opponent activates a Trap Card, Tribute this face-up card to negate the activation of the Trap Card and destroy it.

mst: Negates the activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
misc: Cards based on Konami video games
